title: Bridge Essay: An Investigation of the Free Energy Principle for Emotion Recognition.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Dependent arising — predictive processing, free energy principle, active inference as causal cognition.

**An Investigation of the Free Energy Principle for Emotion Recognition.**. Front Comput Neurosci.. PMID: 32390817. DOI: 10.3389/fncom.2020.00030. This paper offers aprospectus of what might be achievable in the development of emotional recognition devices. It provides aconceptual overview of the free energy principle; including Markov blankets, active inference, and-in particular-adiscussion of selfhood and theory of mind, followed by abrief explanation of how these concepts can explain both neural and cultural models of emotional inference.
